title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Agemono
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian dish made with tender lamb and crispy onions, served with a side of flavorful rice.

ingredients.name: Sauteed Spices
ingredients.notes: Blend of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: Brown the lamb in a large pan over medium heat.
Add sauteed spices and cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 1.5 hours or until the lamb is tender.
Prepare the indulgent rice according to package instructions.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan and fry the thinly sliced onions until crispy.
Serve the lamb on top of the rice with a side of agemono and garnish with fresh parsley.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
